signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: our Q1 2023 cumulative vintage losses through 12 months of being on the books was approximately 20% better than the Q3 2022 vintage over that same period
signal_evidence.pricing_power: our net interest margin was 5.9%, which was up 43 basis points year-over-year... year-over-year net interest margin expansion in every single quarter throughout 2022 and 2023
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We raised our '24 revenue outlook in terms of the range by more than we'd beat in Q1... record $3 billion of deposit growth and 16% growth in tangible book value
